message:
perf(web): switch to WebCodecs for lower latency H.264 decoding

Replace jMuxer/MSE with WebCodecs VideoDecoder for direct H.264 to
canvas rendering. This eliminates the fMP4 muxing and MSE buffering
overhead for lower end-to-end latency.

- Decode H.264 NAL units directly via VideoDecoder
- Render decoded VideoFrame to canvas with drawImage()
- Parse Annex B format and extract codec from SPS
- Add debug stats overlay (enable with #debug=1 in URL)
  - Shows render FPS, received FPS, decode queue, latency, health
